channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Project Helix alpha development kits to ship in 2027; Xbox mode coming to Windows 11 in April
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Xbox

Updates from the Xbox Developer Summit at GDC 2026.

Microsoft Gaming shared updates on its newly announced next-generation hardware Project Helix during the Xbox Developer Summit keynote address at Game Developer Conference 2026, including that it plans to ship alpha versions of the hardware to developers beginning in 2027.

“Project Helix is designed to play your Xbox console and PC games, delivering leading performance and ushering in the next generation of console gaming,” Xbox vice president of next generation Jason Ronald said in an Xbox Wire post.

“Project Helix is powered by a custom AMD [system on chip] and co-designed for the next generation of DirectX and FSR to unlock what comes next.

“It delivers an order of magnitude leap in ray tracing performance and capability, integrates intelligence directly into the graphics and compute pipeline, and drives meaningful gains in efficiency, scale, and visual ambition. The result is more realistic, immersive, and dynamic worlds for players.”

Ronald also said that, as part of Xbox’s 25th anniversary in 2026, it will be “rolling out new ways to play some of the most iconic games from our past.” Further details were not announced.

Microsoft Gaming also plans to bring Xbox mode to Windows 11 in April, starting with select markets. Xbox mode lets players “seamlessly switch between productivity and play, with a familiar full screen and controller optimized Xbox experience while embracing the openness of Windows.” An early version of the mode debuted on ROG Xbox Ally handhelds.

Ronald continued, “This is just the start of the next generation and the next 25 years of Xbox, and we can’t wait to share more later this year. As we listen, learn, and build in partnership with the industry and the community, we’d like to thank you for being part of the journey and making gaming so unique and enduring.”



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/project-helix-alpha-development-kits-to-ship-in-2027-xbox-mode-coming-to-windows-11-in-april
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Multiplayer action survival first-person shooter The Legend of California announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Set on the Island of California during the gold rush era.

Publisher Dreamhaven and developer Kintsugiyama have announced The Legend of California, a multiplayer action survival first-person shooter set on the Island of California during the gold rush era. It will launch in Early Access for PC via Steam and Epic Games Store in 2026.

Here is an overview of the game, via Dreamhaven:

About

The Legend of California is a multiplayer, action survival first-person shooter set on the Island of California during the gold rush era.

Explore, gather, craft, build, hunt, and fight your way across a vast untamed frontier. Whether you choose to travel alone or work together with friends, your mission on this mythical island is not just to survive, but thrive.

Stay strong, stake your claim, and become the true Legend of California.

Key Features

  • Discover an expansive, ever-changing open world inspired by the gold rush era that features distinct biomes, challenging PvE encounters, and iconic California landmarks.
  • Master first-person shooter combat that rewards precision and skill—whether you’re hunting wildlife to stay alive, taking down hostile encampments for some quick coin, or defending your territory against enemy players in optional player-versus-player.
  • Leverage robust gathering and crafting systems to transform the Californian wilderness into everything you need to survive, from weapons for protection and tools for expansion to delicious meals to stay fed and ready.
  • Establish and expand your own ranch; build a mine, add stables, and unlock powerful new crafting stations to further customize your slice of the wild.
  • Play online on persistent multiplayer servers where you can forge your legacy solo or form a company with up to three other players, sharing resources, buildings, progress, and more.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/multiplayer-action-survival-first-person-shooter-the-legend-of-california-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Calamity Angels: Special Delivery for PC launches April 15
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Currently available for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Switch.

The PC version of delivery service RPG Calamity Angels: Special Delivery will launch via Steam on April 15, publisher Idea Factory International announced. It will support English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese language options.

Calamity Angels: Special Delivery first launched for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Switch on June 26, 2025 in Japan and February 17, 2026 in the west.

Here is an overview of the game, via Idea Factory International:

About

Lead a rag-tag group of kooky carriers in this delivery service RPG as they protect and trek packages through treacherous terrains, unruly monsters, and meet other sneaky delivery service teams ready to stake their claim as the best delivery service in the Orkotris Region!

A new adventure awaits with every package!

Key Features

  • In the Mood for Battle? – Running a tip-top delivery service means mailing out orders AND keeping your crew in check. Watch their moods—if they’re unhappy, they might ignore your commands, but their negligence could deliver positive surprises and even victories in battle!
  • Out for Delivery! – Head to the Bulletin Board and see what deliveries await! Inspect the parcel, pack it tightly (no gaps allowed!), and assemble your crew with the right gear (to bonk any pesky foes) and tools for a smooth drop-off. Each successful drop-off delivers sweet rewards your way, so handle with care!
  • Delivery in Three-to-Five Business Days (Unless you Run into a Boss) – Start your adventure with a roulette spin to determine your next move. Land on shop spaces for goodies, collect special packages for rewards, and maybe tackle some sneaky bosses along the way!
  • Kei Nanameda… Delivers! – From the character designer of Mary Skelter and Death end re;Quest, Kei Nanameda presents a fresh delivery service world with lively dialogue, intense battles, and a quirky cast full of energy!

Watch a new trailer below.

PC Gameplay Overview Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/calamity-angels-special-delivery-for-pc-launches-april-15
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
